name: Arizer Frosted Glass Reducer (19-11)
summary: This 19mm female downstem can be adapted to fit 11mm male glass-on-glass fittings.
description: This 19mm female downstem can be adapted to fit 11mm male glass-on-glass fittings. It is an official Arizer product that is compatible with the Arizer XQ2 and Extreme Q. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
